buildingDeptContact.hours: Mon–Thu 7:30 AM–5:30 PM; Fri 7:30 AM–4:30 PM
buildingDeptContact.address: 4045 Palos Verdes Drive North, Rolling Hills Estates, CA 90274

fireAgency: LA County Fire Department — Battalion 14, Station 106
notes: Large-lot SFR city on Palos Verdes Peninsula. VHFHSZ citywide — CBC Chapter 7A applies to all new construction. Class A fire-rated roofing required citywide. Building & Safety contracted to Willdan. ADU Ordinance 745 found HCD non-compliant March 2025 — state law governs. RPD zone has active multi-family (407-unit Brickwalk Residences at 655 Deep Valley Dr).
